acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The qd workflow documents repo-relative report path recording for qd worktree branches.
The general orchestration runbook tells agents not to record .qd/worktrees paths in qd runs.
The documentation describes exporting qd state from the qd root into the worktree roadmap file after qd state recording.

Scope excludes qd behavior changes, historical report rewrites, product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, and credential-dependent claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a qd workflow documentation alignment node and does not require product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
